name: DevFolio Pro
title: Developer Portfolio Portal
desc: A modern, highly responsive personal portfolio website designed to seamlessly showcase projects, skills, and professional experience. Features smooth animations, dynamic dark/light theme support, and a robust backend integration for managing testimonials and contact form submissions.
challenge: Creating a highly performant, accessible, and visually engaging portfolio capable of dynamic content updates.
solution: Leveraged Next.js for server-side rendering and Tailwind CSS for rapid, responsive styling, ensuring sub-second load times.

name: AegisHealth Hub
title: AegisHealth Medical Management System
desc: An advanced healthcare management system designed to streamline patient records, appointment scheduling, and clinic workflows. Focuses on data security and an intuitive user experience for both medical staff and patients.
challenge: Managing sensitive patient data securely while providing real-time appointment syncing.
solution: Implemented a secure API-driven architecture with encrypted database storage and real-time state management.

name: RakshaVision AI
title: Raksha Vision: Intelligent Surveillance
desc: An intelligent surveillance and security monitoring system utilizing advanced algorithms to detect anomalies and ensure environmental safety. Built to provide real-time alerts and comprehensive visual analytics.
challenge: Processing high-resolution video streams for anomaly detection without high latency.
solution: Utilized optimized TypeScript pipelines and modern streaming protocols to ensure rapid frame processing.

name: HireHub Connect
title: Hire Hub Recruitment Platform
desc: A comprehensive recruitment and talent acquisition platform designed to bridge the gap between top-tier candidates and leading employers through an intuitive matching algorithm.
challenge: Filtering through massive volumes of candidate profiles to find relevant matches efficiently.
solution: Developed a robust search and filtering algorithm integrated with an optimized database schema.

name: HireHub Core API
title: Hire Hub Backend Engine
desc: The robust, highly scalable backend engine powering the Hire Hub ecosystem. Engineered to handle secure authentication, complex database queries, and real-time notifications for the recruitment process.
challenge: Building a resilient and scalable backend capable of handling high concurrent user traffic during job fairs.
solution: Implemented a scalable microservices-inspired architecture using Java and Spring Boot.

name: VaultPay Gateway API
title: Vault Pay Secure Backend
desc: A highly secure, enterprise-grade payment processing backend. Vault Pay ensures rapid, encrypted transactions and seamless integration with third-party banking APIs for reliable financial operations.
challenge: Ensuring zero data loss and PCI-DSS compliance for sensitive payment data.
solution: Built a robust C# .NET core backend with strong data encryption and transactional database mechanisms.

name: VaultPay UI
title: Vault Pay Fintech Dashboard
desc: The frontend client for Vault Pay, offering users a sleek, intuitive dashboard to track transactions, manage wallets, and view financial analytics in real-time.
challenge: Displaying complex financial data sets in an easy-to-understand, responsive format.
solution: Utilized advanced charting libraries and TypeScript to create a type-safe, fluid user interface.

name: CareQueue Sync
title: Hospital Queue Management System
desc: An intelligent queue management solution engineered for modern hospitals. It reduces patient wait times and optimizes resource allocation across various hospital departments.
challenge: Handling dynamic, unpredictable patient influx and priority routing for emergencies.
solution: Implemented a real-time queuing algorithm with WebSocket integration for live screen updates.

name: Vidary Studio
title: Vidary AI Video Generator
desc: An AI-powered platform that transforms text prompts into stunning, informative short videos using advanced Gemini video models. Features a chat-based interface built for creators and educators.
challenge: Handling resource-intensive AI video generation requests asynchronously without blocking the main thread.
solution: Integrated job queues and serverless functions to process and store generated AI videos efficiently.

name: HireHub Frontend
title: Hire Hub UI Interface
desc: The dynamic and interactive frontend application for Hire Hub, providing recruiters and applicants with a seamless, accessible, and fast web experience.
challenge: Ensuring a fully accessible and responsive layout across all device types.
solution: Leveraged React and Tailwind CSS to build a component-driven, highly accessible interface.

name: Shiksha ERP
title: Shiksha RCPIT Educational ERP
desc: A comprehensive Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) system tailored specifically for RCPIT. It digitizes academic tracking, attendance, inventory, and faculty management.
challenge: Aggregating scattered academic data into a single, cohesive, and queryable system.
solution: Utilized Python scripts and Jupyter Notebooks for initial data cleaning, followed by a robust relational database design.

name: EmotiCrypt
title: Emoticon Encrypter
desc: A fun and innovative cybersecurity tool that encrypts standard text messages into a string of emojis, providing a unique layer of obfuscation for casual communications.
challenge: Mapping complex character sets to specific emojis while ensuring complete reversibility.
solution: Developed a custom bidirectional encoding algorithm using JavaScript dictionaries.

name: Rupya Scanner
title: Rupya Pehchano AI App
desc: An assistive technology application designed to help visually impaired users identify Indian currency notes accurately using machine learning and computer vision.
challenge: Achieving high accuracy in currency recognition under varying lighting and camera quality conditions.
solution: Implemented a fine-tuned image classification model accessible via a lightweight mobile-friendly PWA.

name: SREIR Portal
title: SREIR College ERP System
desc: A robust campus management ERP designed for SREIR College. Built with Next.js, MongoDB, and DaisyUI to handle student registrations, academic records, and institutional communications.
challenge: Creating an intuitive UI that administrative staff could easily adopt without extensive training.
solution: Leveraged DaisyUI for clean, accessible component design and Next.js for swift page transitions.

name: KrishiSathi Platform
title: Krishi Sathi Agritech App
desc: An agricultural technology platform aimed at assisting farmers with real-time weather updates, crop market prices, and farming best practices to maximize yield and profitability.
challenge: Delivering data quickly to rural areas with potentially low internet bandwidth.
solution: Designed a highly optimized, caching-first architecture to ensure offline capabilities and fast loading.

name: Parkify Smart
title: Prakify Smart Parking System
desc: A comprehensive smart parking management system that tracks available parking spots in real-time, allowing users to pre-book slots and reducing urban traffic congestion.
challenge: Synchronizing real-time parking slot availability across multiple active users.
solution: Utilized MongoDB change streams and Next.js server actions to provide instant UI updates.

name: InstaAnalyzer AI
title: Insta Plus AI Analytics
desc: An advanced social media analytics tool that leverages the Apify API to perform deep analysis of Instagram profiles, extracting engagement metrics, follower demographics, and content trends.
challenge: Handling large JSON payloads from the Apify API and processing the data into readable charts.
solution: Implemented efficient data aggregation pipelines in TypeScript to transform raw data into visualization-ready formats.

name: Pramaan Verify
title: Pramaan Patra Certificate System
desc: A secure digital certification platform enabling institutions to issue, manage, and verify authentic certificates digitally, mitigating the risk of credential forgery.
challenge: Creating a tamper-proof verification mechanism for issued certificates.
solution: Generated unique cryptographic hashes for each certificate, stored securely in the database for instant verification.

name: Surakshit Vault
title: Surakshit Decentralized Data Vault
desc: A decentralized, blockchain-based cloud storage solution designed specifically for Disaster Management Systems, ensuring critical data remains accessible and immutable during crises.
challenge: Ensuring 100% data uptime and protection against single points of failure.
solution: Integrated IPFS (InterPlanetary File System) via TypeScript smart contracts for decentralized redundancy.

name: PhishGuard AI
title: Phish Guard Threat Detection
desc: A cutting-edge cybersecurity application utilizing Machine Learning and Explainable AI (XAI) to detect and flag spam emails and SMS phishing attempts, built with Next.js and Python.
challenge: Providing transparent reasoning for why a message was flagged as spam (Explainability).
solution: Integrated Python ML models via an API, outputting confidence scores and decision trees to the Next.js frontend.

name: MukhPass Vision
title: Mukh Pass Smart Attendance
desc: A smart, AI-powered face recognition system that automates employee or student attendance. Combines the power of Next.js for the UI and Python's face_recognition library for backend processing.
challenge: Accurately identifying faces in a fast-moving, multi-person environment.
solution: Created a hybrid architecture where WebRTC handles live feeds and Python rapidly processes frame embeddings.

name: CodeGenie IDE
title: CodeGenie AI Code Editor
desc: An Electron-based, AI-augmented code editor similar to VS Code. Features built-in Language Server Protocol (LSP) support and a voice-enabled AI chat to assist developers in writing, debugging, and refactoring code.
challenge: Integrating AI seamlessly into the local development environment without causing high CPU overhead.
solution: Built a lightweight Electron wrapper and offloaded heavy AI computations to a cloud API.

name: PrecisionBake Pro
title: Precision Baking Companion
desc: A specialized application for professional bakers and culinary enthusiasts, offering highly precise recipe scaling, ingredient substitution calculations, and step-by-step timer management.
challenge: Handling complex fractional math for accurate recipe scaling.
solution: Implemented specialized utility functions in TypeScript to manage exact unit conversions.

name: SatyaChain Authenticator
title: Satya Chain Anti-Counterfeit
desc: A blockchain-based product verification system designed to combat counterfeiting. Consumers can scan product codes to trace the entire supply chain journey and verify product authenticity.
challenge: Ensuring the physical product securely links to the digital blockchain ledger.
solution: Utilized NFC tags and secure QR codes paired with smart contracts for immutable product identity.

name: VidyaRakshak Monitor
title: Vidya Rakshak Campus Security
desc: An advanced campus surveillance and management tool aimed at tracking student whereabouts during academic hours to reduce truancy and enhance student safety.
challenge: Balancing effective monitoring with student privacy and data security.
solution: Implemented anonymized data logging and restricted RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) for administrative use only.

name: DeepShield Sentinel
title: DeepShield AI Security
desc: A deep learning initiative focused on identifying network intrusions and malicious patterns within traffic data, utilizing complex neural networks modeled in Jupyter Notebooks.
challenge: Training models on massive network packet datasets effectively.
solution: Used Pandas and optimized data batching in Jupyter to train PyTorch models systematically.

name: EmotiveAI Companion
title: Emotive AI Mood Tracker
desc: A wellness and mental health application that uses AI to analyze user inputs and suggest interventions, music, or activities aimed at positively altering their mood.
challenge: Accurately inferring user sentiment from brief textual inputs.
solution: Integrated Natural Language Processing (NLP) models to map text to a multidimensional emotion spectrum.

name: NeuroStream Engine
title: Neuro Stream Data Pipeline
desc: A high-performance data streaming platform designed to handle complex event processing and real-time analytics, suitable for IoT and biometric data aggregation.
challenge: Maintaining high throughput with zero data loss under heavy load.
solution: Implemented a distributed messaging queue architecture natively integrated with TypeScript microservices.

name: Opportune Tracker
title: Opportune Habit App
desc: A productivity and habit-tracking application that gamifies personal goals, helping users discover the right opportunities to build lasting positive routines.
challenge: Keeping users engaged and motivated over long periods.
solution: Introduced gamification elements like streaks, badges, and interactive charts built with React.

name: KapusSwasthya Vision
title: Cotton Disease Prediction AI
desc: An agricultural AI tool specifically trained to identify diseases in cotton crops via leaf images. It provides farmers with quick diagnoses and pesticide recommendations.
challenge: Deploying a heavy CNN image model to run efficiently on mobile browsers.
solution: Converted the trained model to TensorFlow.js format for fast, client-side inference.

name: SafeSurf Extension
title: Malicious Website Blocker
desc: A browser extension designed to protect users by cross-referencing URLs in real-time against a database of known phishing, malware, and malicious sites.
challenge: Checking URLs against large blacklists without adding noticeable latency to page loads.
solution: Implemented an optimized local cache mechanism utilizing Chrome Extension Storage APIs.

name: JS Mastery 90
title: 90 Days of JavaScript Practice
desc: A comprehensive compilation of 90 daily JavaScript projects and algorithms designed to master vanilla JS, DOM manipulation, and modern ES6+ features. Includes a live Digital Clock project.
challenge: Creating distinct, progressive learning projects daily.
solution: Structured the repository logically with increasing difficulty, utilizing clean, vanilla JavaScript.

name: EduCloud Admin
title: EduCloud Console
desc: A centralized administration console for educational institutions to manage cloud resources, digital libraries, and virtual classrooms seamlessly.
challenge: Aggregating multiple cloud APIs into a single, unified dashboard.
solution: Built a backend-for-frontend (BFF) layer in Next.js to aggregate and simplify API responses.

name: GenoSpark CMS
title: Headless Content Management System
desc: A flexible, headless Content Management System (CMS) that empowers creators to manage dynamic content, blogs, and media assets, delivering them swiftly via API to any frontend.
challenge: Providing dynamic schema generation for varied content types.
solution: Implemented a flexible JSON-based document schema on top of PostgreSQL.

name: RenoSpace Platform
title: Reno Real Estate Platform
desc: A property technology platform showcasing modern UI/UX practices for real estate listings, featuring interactive maps, property filtering, and high-quality image galleries.
challenge: Rendering high volumes of image-heavy property cards seamlessly.
solution: Utilized Next.js Image optimization and lazy loading techniques for fluid performance.

name: CalcPro
title: Advanced Web Calculator
desc: A sleek, purely frontend mathematical calculator featuring standard operations, scientific functions, and a history log, built fundamentally with raw HTML/CSS/JS.
challenge: Handling floating-point math precision errors natively in JavaScript.
solution: Implemented custom parsing functions to fix rounding errors associated with IEEE 754.

name: CertiTrack Dashboard
title: CertiTrack Credential Manager
desc: An intuitive platform for professionals to store, track, and share their professional certifications and licenses, ensuring they never miss a renewal deadline.
challenge: Automating email reminders based on expiration dates.
solution: Integrated cron jobs via Node.js to routinely check dates and dispatch SendGrid emails.

name: Road2Tech Hub
title: Road2Tech Career Roadmap
desc: An educational platform providing aspiring software engineers with interactive, curated roadmaps and learning resources to master various technical disciplines.
challenge: Creating an interactive, node-based visual roadmap UI.
solution: Utilized React Flow to build drag-and-drop, interactive learning paths.

name: Rentify Market
title: Rentify P2P Rentals
desc: A peer-to-peer rental marketplace connecting people who have items to rent (cameras, tools, etc.) with those who need them temporarily, featuring a secure booking system.
challenge: Managing complex booking calendars to prevent date overlaps.
solution: Developed a robust date-range checking algorithm in the Node.js backend.

name: MediTrack Systems
title: Medi Track Health Logger
desc: A personal health logging application enabling users to diligently track their medication schedules, symptoms, and doctor appointments in a secure environment.
challenge: Ensuring a mobile-first, highly accessible UI for elderly users.
solution: Adopted large-touch-target design principles and high-contrast styling using Tailwind CSS.

name: BlockEvidence EMS
title: Blockchain Evidence Management System
desc: A cutting-edge forensic Evidence Management System utilizing blockchain technology to ensure an unbreakable chain of custody and immutable evidence logs for law enforcement.
challenge: Ensuring cryptographic hashes of files match across the network securely.
solution: Integrated SHA-256 hashing alongside Ethereum smart contracts to verify file integrity.

name: Sketch2Img AI
title: Sketch to Image AI Generator
desc: An innovative creative tool that leverages advanced generative AI models to transform rough user sketches into fully realized, high-fidelity digital artworks instantly.
challenge: Handling HTML5 canvas drawing data and transmitting it efficiently to an AI backend.
solution: Serialized canvas data into compressed Base64 strings before dispatching to the Stable Diffusion API.

name: GirhaSetu Portal
title: Girha Setu Property Connect
desc: A localized real estate and housing connection platform bridging the gap between property owners, agents, and buyers, specifically tailored for regional Indian markets.
challenge: Implementing complex multi-criteria property searches rapidly.
solution: Used complex MongoDB indexing and aggregation pipelines to return search results swiftly.

name: MediFind Directory
title: Medi Find Clinic Locator
desc: A geolocation-based healthcare directory application that assists users in quickly locating nearby clinics, pharmacies, and specialized doctors during emergencies.
challenge: Providing accurate geospatial querying based on user location.
solution: Utilized PostGIS extensions in a PostgreSQL database for rapid coordinate radius searching.

name: MedChain Secure
title: MedChain Medical Vault
desc: A blockchain-secured vault for Electronic Health Records (EHR). It guarantees patient data privacy, allowing patients to grant temporary, verifiable access to healthcare providers.
challenge: Balancing absolute data privacy with necessary medical accessibility.
solution: Implemented zero-knowledge proofs (ZKP) and decentralized identity protocols.

name: StenoSecure Text
title: Steno Secure Steganography
desc: A digital steganography application allowing users to securely hide encrypted textual messages within the pixel data of standard image files without noticeably altering visual quality.
challenge: Manipulating image bits natively in the browser without backend processing.
solution: Utilized HTML5 Canvas Context and typed arrays (Uint8ClampedArray) for fast bitwise operations.

name: LeafScan AI
title: Plant Disease Detection Tool
desc: An agricultural diagnostic tool leveraging machine learning to detect diseases in various plant species. Users upload photos to receive instant analysis and remediation advice.
challenge: Ensuring the AI model categorizes varied species correctly.
solution: Implemented a pre-filtering mechanism to classify the plant type before running the disease-specific CNN.

name: CrimeTrace Forensics
title: Crime Trace AI Analyst
desc: A data analysis and visualization tool intended for law enforcement to identify crime hotspots, track incident trends, and predict potential future infractions using statistical AI.
challenge: Visualizing massive sets of temporal-spatial data coherently.
solution: Integrated advanced D3.js and Mapbox GL for interactive, timeline-based heatmaps.

name: DatasetForge AI
title: Prompt to Dataset Generator
desc: A developer productivity utility that uses LLMs (Large Language Models) to autonomously generate vast, structured mock datasets based on simple user prompts, ideal for testing.
challenge: Ensuring the generated JSON/CSV data maintains strict schema adherence without hallucinations.
solution: Utilized strict system prompts and validation libraries (Zod) to parse and correct AI outputs.

name: OncoVision AI
title: RealTumorDetect Model
desc: An advanced deep learning model constructed in Jupyter Notebooks to analyze MRI and X-ray scans for the early detection and segmentation of tumors with high clinical accuracy.
challenge: Dealing with highly imbalanced medical datasets during model training.
solution: Applied advanced data augmentation and loss-weighting techniques in PyTorch.

name: YieldPredict Pro
title: Crop Yield Production Engine
desc: An agricultural forecasting application that integrates historical weather data, soil quality metrics, and crop types to predict harvest yields, aiding in supply chain planning.
challenge: Aggregating multiple distinct datasets into a single predictive formula.
solution: Built a robust backend API that queries multiple meteorological and soil databases concurrently.

name: TributeConnect Social
title: Tribute Connect Platform
desc: A respectful, dedicated social platform for families and friends to memorialize loved ones, share memories, and organize tribute events collaboratively.
challenge: Ensuring a highly respectful, ad-free, and secure environment for sensitive personal media.
solution: Implemented strict privacy controls and a scalable cloud-storage architecture for media hosting.

name: FinScore AI
title: Loan Predictor Intelligence
desc: A financial analysis tool that evaluates user financial data, credit history, and employment status to predict the likelihood of loan approval, mitigating risk for lenders.
challenge: Creating an unbiased predictive model adhering to financial regulations.
solution: Carefully selected model features and utilized interpretable ML algorithms to avoid black-box bias.

name: TaskFlow Agile
title: Task Flow Kanban Manager
desc: A highly interactive, visually appealing Kanban-style project management tool enabling teams to coordinate workflows, track sprints, and manage daily task assignments efficiently.
challenge: Creating a frictionless, performant drag-and-drop interface across desktop and mobile.
solution: Integrated react-beautiful-dnd with optimized state updates to ensure 60fps animations.

name: WanderMate Hub
title: Travel Buddy Finder System
desc: A social networking application specifically tailored for travelers, allowing users to match with compatible travel companions based on itineraries, interests, and budgets.
challenge: Creating a robust matching algorithm incorporating timeframes and geographic coordinates.
solution: Implemented a multi-factor matching engine querying a NoSQL database for flexible user profiles.

name: AuthFace Biometrics
title: Facial Authentication System
desc: A robust, passwordless biometric authentication system providing seamless and highly secure login mechanisms via facial mapping and liveness detection.
challenge: Preventing spoofing attacks (e.g., using a photograph) during authentication.
solution: Integrated liveness detection algorithms requiring users to perform specific micro-movements.

name: PotholePatrol
title: Road Fixer Crowdsourcing
desc: A civic-tech crowdsourcing platform empowering citizens to report infrastructural damages like potholes or broken streetlights, automatically dispatching data to local authorities.
challenge: Handling large volumes of geo-tagged image uploads concurrently.
solution: Leveraged cloud storage buckets with pre-signed URLs to offload direct image handling from the backend.

name: ImgDiffy Engine
title: Image 3 Diffy Visualizer
desc: A specialized computer vision tool that highlights structural and pixel-level differences between multiple iterations of an image, highly useful for design QA and testing.
challenge: Computing pixel differences quickly without freezing the main browser thread.
solution: Employed Web Workers to offload heavy pixel-array math calculations.

name: MailMaven Automator
title: Mail Maven Bulk Generator
desc: A high-efficiency web-based tool for generating personalized certificates in bulk and orchestrating automated email distribution. Ideal for webinars, courses, and large events.
challenge: Preventing email API rate limits while sending thousands of emails.
solution: Architected a Redis-backed job queue (BullMQ) to throttle and manage outbound email traffic.

name: TradePlus Insight
title: Trade Plus AI Analytics
desc: A cutting-edge algorithmic trading dashboard that aggregates live market data and utilizes machine learning models to detect chart patterns and suggest market trends.
challenge: Rendering high-frequency, real-time candlestick charts without UI lag.
solution: Integrated lightweight charting libraries and optimized WebSocket payload parsing.

name: Pramaan VerifyChain
title: Praaman Check Blockchain System
desc: A decentralized verification protocol providing organizations with a highly secure method of issuing and validating credentials on an immutable public ledger.
challenge: Lowering gas fees for bulk credential issuance on the blockchain.
solution: Utilized a Layer-2 scaling solution (Polygon) and implemented Merkle Tree batching.

name: KalaNirmata Scheduler
title: Kalanirmata Timetable Generator
desc: An algorithmic scheduling system specifically engineered for educational institutions to automatically generate clash-free timetables accommodating complex faculty and room constraints.
challenge: Solving the NP-hard problem of scheduling without infinite looping.
solution: Implemented a Genetic Algorithm optimization strategy in the backend to discover the best fit schedule.

name: Plateful Nutrition AI
title: Plateful AI Dietician
desc: An intelligent culinary application that generates personalized meal plans and recipes based on user macros, dietary restrictions, and available pantry ingredients using AI.
challenge: Translating subjective dietary preferences into exact nutritional mathematical targets.
solution: Trained an intermediary model layer to convert natural language food constraints into precise API queries.

name: FaceFinder OSINT
title: Facefinder AI Tracker
desc: A powerful Open Source Intelligence (OSINT) tool integrating advanced facial recognition APIs to assist in finding matching public digital footprints based on a single image.
challenge: Handling intense API rate limiting from various integrated image-search providers.
solution: Built a staggered queueing system that caches search results to prevent duplicate API hits.

name: Lekhna Editor
title: Lekhna Distraction-Free Writer
desc: A minimalist, highly optimized markdown editor designed for writers and developers. Focuses on providing a distraction-free environment with local-first auto-saving and rich text export.
challenge: Ensuring zero data loss for users working entirely offline.
solution: Leveraged IndexedDB for robust, persistent local storage wrapping it with a seamless sync API.

name: GreenThumb Market
title: Gardeningstore E-commerce
desc: A robust e-commerce storefront specifically catering to gardening enthusiasts. Features complex inventory management, a seamless checkout process, and dynamic categorization for plants and tools.
challenge: Handling complex shopping cart state alongside dynamic shipping cost calculations.
solution: Implemented session-based cart management optimized within a custom PHP backend architecture.

name: AgriChain Trust
title: Agri Food Blockchain Tracer
desc: A supply chain transparency platform that tracks agricultural produce from farm to fork using blockchain, guaranteeing organic certifications and fair trade practices.
challenge: Making blockchain interactions user-friendly for non-technical farmers and consumers.
solution: Built a frictionless Next.js frontend that abstracts all Web3 wallet interactions behind simple logins.

name: PlantHealth Monitor
title: PlantHealth IoT Dashboard
desc: An IoT-integrated platform for avid gardeners and farmers to continuously monitor soil moisture, sunlight, and nutrient levels via connected hardware sensors.
challenge: Ingesting and parsing continuous streams of sensor telemetry data.
solution: Utilized MQTT protocols to lightweight the data payload directly into a time-series database.

name: GreenRevive Hub
title: Green Revive Sustainability
desc: A community-driven sustainability platform encouraging eco-friendly practices. Features carbon footprint calculators, recycling guides, and local green event planning.
challenge: Creating an engaging, gamified system to encourage continuous ecological action.
solution: Integrated an achievement API rewarding users with badges for logged sustainable activities.

name: YouSave Finance
title: You Save Budgeting Assistant
desc: A personal finance management application that intuitively tracks expenses, categorizes spending, and establishes dynamic budget goals to optimize personal savings.
challenge: Automatically categorizing imported bank transactions accurately.
solution: Implemented string-matching algorithms alongside user-defined categorization rules.

name: CivicResolve Portal
title: Civil Issue Resolution Desk
desc: A structured ticketing system enabling citizens to log civil complaints directly to municipal authorities, tracking resolution progress via a transparent public dashboard.
challenge: Structuring complex departmental routing for varied types of civic complaints.
solution: Developed a robust state-machine in PHP to handle ticket lifecycles and escalations.

name: AgriSupply Link
title: Agri Food Supply Chain Manager
desc: A comprehensive logistics tool tailored for the agricultural sector, optimizing the transportation routes and storage capacities for perishable food items to minimize waste.
challenge: Calculating optimal delivery routes considering varying shelf-lives of produce.
solution: Integrated map APIs with custom sorting algorithms prioritizing perishability and distance.

name: AstroShield Defense
title: Astro Shield Game Engine
desc: An interactive, web-based space defense game showcasing complex collision physics, particle systems, and high-performance rendering within the modern browser environment.
challenge: Maintaining a stable 60 Frames Per Second (FPS) while rendering hundreds of moving sprites.
solution: Optimized the game loop using `requestAnimationFrame` and decoupled physics calculations from rendering logic.

name: Trackonomy Logistics
title: Trackonomy Fleet Tracker
desc: A fleet management and economics tracker for delivery companies, providing granular data on vehicle fuel efficiency, driver performance, and overall delivery costs.
challenge: Aggregating continuous GPS and telemetry data into meaningful economic reports.
solution: Used MongoDB aggregation pipelines to crunch large sets of telemetry points efficiently.

name: Gamanika Toll AI
title: GPS Based Toll Collection
desc: A modern alternative to physical toll plazas, utilizing precise GPS geofencing to automatically deduct toll charges when a vehicle traverses specific highway segments.
challenge: Accurately resolving GPS drift to prevent false toll charges.
solution: Implemented complex spatial mapping algorithms that snap raw GPS coordinates to known highway vectors.

name: FaceTrack Pro
title: FaceTrack Identity Manager
desc: A highly specialized identity management suite utilizing biometric facial mapping for secure facility access control, tailored for high-security enterprise environments.
challenge: Ensuring facial matching operations are completely secure and non-reversible.
solution: Stored only mathematical vector embeddings of faces, never raw image data, ensuring privacy compliance.

name: LocalGov Diaries
title: LG Data Dairies Dashboard
desc: A comprehensive data visualization dashboard created for Local Government entities to seamlessly log, track, and transparently publish their daily administrative and public works progress.
challenge: Presenting dense bureaucratic data in an accessible, public-friendly format.
solution: Leveraged responsive charting libraries to transform raw tabular data into intuitive visual infographics.

name: VidhyaRachna Builder
title: VidhyaRachna ATS Resume Builder
desc: A powerful, dynamic resume generation application designed to help students craft ATS-compliant (Applicant Tracking System) resumes through guided, intelligent templates.
challenge: Exporting pixel-perfect, highly formatted HTML to universally accepted PDF files.
solution: Integrated Java-based PDF generation libraries (iText) on the backend for flawless document compilation.

name: RationFlow System
title: Ration Management Platform
desc: A digitized public distribution platform aimed at streamlining ration inventory management, ensuring transparent allocation, and reducing discrepancies in food supply.
challenge: Securing the allocation process to prevent fraudulent distributions.
solution: Implemented a strict authentication flow linking beneficiary ID cards to secure database entries.

name: WebShield Extension
title: Malicious Website Web Extension
desc: A sophisticated browser extension that actively intercepts and analyzes web traffic. It uses a Python backend running machine learning models to classify and block zero-day malicious domains.
challenge: Bridging a client-side browser extension with a heavy Python ML backend smoothly.
solution: Constructed a highly optimized REST API in Python (FastAPI) for rapid URL evaluation.
